composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: Realized volatility improved 0.4pp closer to the 40% threshold, but the 1yr-high gap worsened 1.2pp further below -35%, now at -49.6%. Signal would flip only on a crisis z-score below -3.0 or a recovery above the 200d MA to exit the bear regime.
